title: Cloud Hosting Services Agreement — Revision History

clauses.title: Service Description
clauses.text: The Provider shall deliver managed cloud hosting services including dedicated virtual servers, automated daily backups, load balancing, and 24/7 monitoring as described in Schedule A.

clauses.title: SLA
clauses.text: The Provider guarantees 99.9% monthly uptime. Scheduled maintenance windows of up to four (4) hours per month shall be excluded from uptime calculations.

clauses.title: Pricing
clauses.text: The Client shall pay monthly hosting fees of $8,500 by the fifteenth of each month. Annual price adjustments shall not exceed 5%.

clauses.title: Security
clauses.text: The Provider shall implement encryption at rest and in transit, multi-factor authentication, and quarterly penetration testing per SOC 2 Type II.

clauses.title: Term
clauses.text: This Agreement shall have an initial term of two (2) years, automatically renewing for successive one-year periods unless either party provides ninety (90) days written notice of non-renewal prior to the end of the then-current term.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Virginia.

version_history.author: Drafter

clauses.title: Service Description
clauses.text: The Provider shall deliver managed cloud hosting services including dedicated virtual servers, automated daily backups, load balancing, and 24/7 monitoring as described in Schedule A.

clauses.title: SLA
clauses.text: The Provider guarantees 99.9% monthly uptime. Scheduled maintenance windows of up to four (4) hours per month shall be excluded from uptime calculations.

clauses.title: Pricing
clauses.text: The Client shall pay monthly hosting fees of $8,500 by the fifteenth of each month. Annual price adjustments shall not exceed 5%.

clauses.title: Security
clauses.text: The Provider shall implement encryption at rest and in transit, multi-factor authentication, and quarterly penetration testing per SOC 2 Type II.

clauses.title: Term
clauses.text: This Agreement shall have an initial term of two (2) years, automatically renewing for successive one-year periods unless either party provides ninety (90) days written notice of non-renewal prior to the end of the then-current term.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Virginia.

clauses.title: Disaster Recovery
clauses.text: The Provider shall maintain a disaster recovery plan with RTO of four hours and RPO of one hour.

clauses.title: Data Ownership
clauses.text: All Client data remains exclusive property of the Client.

clauses.title: IP
clauses.text: The Provider retains all IP rights in its platform and tools.

clauses.title: Liability Limitation
clauses.text: Provider total liability shall not exceed twelve months of hosting fees.

clauses.title: Service Description
clauses.text: The Provider shall deliver managed cloud hosting services including dedicated virtual servers, automated daily backups, load balancing, and 24/7 monitoring as described in Schedule A.

clauses.title: SLA
clauses.text: The Provider guarantees 99.9% monthly uptime. Scheduled maintenance windows of up to four (4) hours per month shall be excluded from uptime calculations.

clauses.title: Pricing
clauses.text: The Client shall pay monthly hosting fees of $8,500 by the fifteenth of each month. Annual price adjustments shall not exceed 8%.

clauses.title: Security
clauses.text: The Provider shall implement encryption at rest and in transit, multi-factor authentication, and quarterly penetration testing per SOC 2 Type II.

clauses.title: Term
clauses.text: This Agreement shall have an initial term of two (2) years, automatically renewing for successive one-year periods unless either party provides ninety (90) days written notice of non-renewal prior to the end of the then-current term.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Virginia.

clauses.title: Disaster Recovery
clauses.text: The Provider shall maintain a disaster recovery plan with RTO of four hours and RPO of one hour.

clauses.title: Data Ownership
clauses.text: All Client data remains exclusive property of the Client.

clauses.title: IP
clauses.text: The Provider retains all IP rights in its platform and tools.

clauses.title: Liability Limitation
clauses.text: Provider total liability shall not exceed twelve months of hosting fees.

clauses.title: Data Migration
clauses.text: Upon termination, Provider shall provide data migration assistance for thirty (30) days at no charge.

clauses.title: Termination for Convenience
clauses.text: The Client may terminate this Agreement at any time for convenience upon seven (7) days written notice, effective immediately upon the expiration of such notice period, without regard to the remaining term or any auto-renewal provisions.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party shall protect the other confidential information with reasonable care for five (5) years from disclosure.
